textPlain: This is a fun, extremely kitschy place to check out if you're in the area and want a break from hiking the Smokies. I also like the pancake place, Flapjack's, next door.But the real star in that shopping center is Smoky Mountain Farms Jelly House. They have a ton of really interesting jellies and butters that I've never seen anywhere. Corn cob jelly, scuppernong jelly, sweet potato butter. Super cool place if you like different flavors.
Haven't seen a website like that in a while. Rather nostalgic and cozy.> Google+ badgeNow even moreso!
We visited it on our honeymoon!It is near a business called Pappy's Junk & Stuff.
